title: hieracium semibipes
intro: Hieracium semibipes, also known as hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family with yellow or yellow-green flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve digestive issues such as constipation and indigestion. The health benefits of Hieracium semibipes include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and improve overall health. Herbal preparations of Hieracium semibipes, such as teas and infusions, can be made by drying the leaves and flowers of the plant and steeping them in hot water.
